body: I am writing to express my interest in the Platform Engineer position at Example Corp. With over five years of experience building delivery infrastructure and backend systems across startup and enterprise environments, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your team’s reliability and automation goals.

Most recently, I designed the infrastructure, environment model, and CI/CD strategy to bring a startup from proof-of-concept to production, cutting provisioning time from over two hours to under ten minutes. This work involved migrating from AWS to GCP using Terraform with identity-based deployments, hardening release pipelines with quality gates and deploy-on-merge automation, and building backend services with Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. At Duotify, I managed delivery infrastructure across Azure DevOps and self-hosted GitLab CE on Linux, maintaining pipeline reliability while reducing release preparation overhead by over thirty minutes.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience aligns with Example Corp’s platform needs. Thank you for your consideration.
